items.title: Here are the teams that reached the World Cup quarterfinals and their global FIFA rankings.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt:
Here are the teams that reached the World Cup quarterfinals and their global FIFA rankings. 
France - 1 
Argentina - 2
Spain - 3 
England - 4
Morocco - 6
Belgium - 8 
Switzerland - 14
Norway - 19

Only two aren’t in the global top eight. In soccer, upsets are rare.

items.title: A proud Grizzlies tradition continues -- if memory serves there have been only four unmatched offer sheets in the last decade and three of them were delivered by Memphis (Kyle Anderson, Tyus Jones, and now Post)

items.title: I’m very curious what number Walker Kessler will wear for the Lakers. He wore No. 24 with the Jazz (that’s not going to work in LA), and he wore No. 13 in college (that’s not going to work with the Lakers either). Maybe he goes with No. 14, as he has with USA Basketball.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: I’m very curious what number Walker Kessler will wear for the Lakers. He wore No. 24 with the Jazz (that’s not going to work in LA), and he wore No. 13 in college (that’s not going to work with the Lakers either). Maybe he goes with No. 14, as he has with USA Basketball.

items.title: Quinten Post's three year, $30 million offer sheet in Memphis only had $9 million guaranteed (first season), but the Grizzlies laced it with unlikely incentives that hit apron calculations.
items.author: Anthony Slater
items.body_excerpt:
Quinten Post's three year, $30 million offer sheet in Memphis only had $9 million guaranteed (first season), but the Grizzlies laced it with unlikely incentives that hit apron calculations.

Warriors decided overall price too rich. They aren't matching.

media.title: Sources: Grizzlies land Post after Warriors pass on offer sheet
media.description: The Warriors will not match the three-year, $30 million offer sheet for reserve center Quinten Post, allowing the restricted free agent to join the Grizzlies.
